column.text:
• Boston Red Sox transferred LHP Garrett Crochet to the 60-day injured list with left shoulder inflammation.
• Arizona Diamondbacks designated RHP Taylor Rashi for assignment.
• Los Angeles Angels designated RHP Shaun Anderson for assignment.
• Milwaukee Brewers designated RHP Jake Woodford for assignment.
• Houston Astros activated 2B Jose Altuve from the 10-day injured list.
• St. Louis Cardinals activated LF Lars Nootbaar from the 60-day injured list.
• Texas Rangers activated LF Wyatt Langford from the 10-day injured list.
• New York Yankees sent LF Jasson Domínguez on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre.
• San Diego Padres released RF Nick Castellanos.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
